TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Zambia, title = Zambia, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Zambia} }

S.FORM: Zambia hya' ga cyux maki' tay 15 00 S, 30 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 752,618 sq km (maki' tay 39ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 743,398 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 9,220 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 15,510,711. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga31.70% , lhlahuy hya' ga 66.30%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 2%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Lusaka. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 24 na tay mawpuw byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Edgar Lungu, aring ryax 25 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Zambia hya' ga cyux maki' tay 15 00 S, 30 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 752,618 sq km (maki' tay 39ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 743,398 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 9,220 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 15,510,711. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga31.70% , lhlahuy hya' ga 66.30%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 2%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Lusaka. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 24 na tay mawpuw byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Edgar Lungu, aring ryax 25 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: zamő≤ia ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** s~…ē, ** ** e na xwe ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a**.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a *%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a lus~…ēaka. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj mawpuw ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a e*…£ar luŇču, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
